text:
The Glam Clan Head is, like his title indicates, the head of the Glam Clan of the Glam Gas Land. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Appearance

The Glam Clan Head is an obese man, late in life, with squinty eyes and threads of hair at three places on his head. As the head of a prestigious clan, he dresses in a dapper fashion in a suit and bow-tie. 

Background

As head of the Glam Clan, he oversees all operations within the Glam Gas Land, and whenever a performance is held at the Royal Glam Hotel, he's sure to be in attendance. It is also said that applause from the Glam Clan Head is tantamount to being recognized at a global level. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

 Note: The following is content from a one-shot written and illustrated by Sui Ishida and recognized by Yoshihiro Togashi, but may or may not be considered canon. 

The Glam Clan Head attends the performance held at the Royal Glam Hotel, by the Moritonio Troupe. Satisfied with the show, he gives them his applause.
